news.summary: Infinity Natural Resources, Inc. shared that they will disclose their financial and operating results for the first quarter of 2025 after the market closes on Monday, May 12, 2025. A conference call led by management is scheduled for the next day, May 13, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET to review the outcomes. To join the call, individuals can dial (800) 715-9871 within the U.S. or +1 (646) 307-1963 internationally, using the reference "Infinity." The Company is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol INR.
news.headline: Infinity Natural Resources will release first quarter 2025 results on May 12, with a conference call on May 13 at 10:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: In Morristown, New Jersey on May 7, 2025, Hepion Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:HEPA), a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in treatments for liver diseases, has announced a significant business move. They have finalized a binding letter of intent with New Day Diagnostics LLC to acquire diagnostic tests for various conditions. These conditions include celiac disease, respiratory multiplex (Covid/Influenza A/B and RSV), helicobacter pylori (H. pylori), and hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC). Notably, the celiac, respiratory multiplex, and H. pylori tests have received CE marks and are authorized for sale in Europe currently.
news.headline: Hepion Pharmaceuticals partners with New Day Diagnostics to commercialize tests for celiac disease, respiratory issues, H. pylori, and HCC in Europe.

news.summary: Miata Metals has released an update on their diamond core drilling program at the Sela Creek Gold Project in Suriname, with a total of 10,000 meters being completed.
news.headline: Miata Metals updates on 10,000m drilling program at Sela Creek Gold Project in Suriname.

news.summary: Orchestra BioMed Holdings, Inc., a biomedical company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol OBIO, headquartered in New Hope, Pennsylvania, revealed on May 7, 2025, the ongoing growth of its worldwide intellectual property portfolio supporting its AVIM therapy pipeline (previously referred to as Cardiac Neuromodulation Therapy or CNT). Within the last year alone, the Company has obtained 10 additional patents specifically focused on the treatment of hypertension. Furthermore, Orchestra BioMed has successfully acquired a total of 17 patents that address the use of this technology in treating heart failure, thereby significantly broadening the scope of its intellectual property platform.
news.headline: Orchestra BioMed has 137 patents for AVIM Therapy for hypertension and heart failure. 10 new patents for hypertension in 12 months.

news.summary: U.S. homebuyers and refinancers rebounded strongly in the previous week, seizing the opportunity presented by slightly lower interest rates as the market awaited the Federal Reserve’s decision. The Mortgage Bankers Association (MBA) revealed that total mortgage applications surged by 11% for the week ending May 2, recovering from the 4.2% decline in the prior week. This increase stands among the top four weekly gains in 2025, indicating a significant revitalization in the housing market amidst conflicting economic indicators. The average 30-year fixed mortgage rate for conforming loan balances (at or below $806,500) dropped to 6.84% from the previous week's 6.89%, prompting a surge in new applications for both purchasing and refinancing. Purchase applications saw an 11% rise, matched by a similar increase in refinance activity. Compared to last year, refinancing volumes have skyrocketed by 51%, marking a stark turnaround after months of sluggish performance.
news.headline: Mortgage applications surged 11% as rates dropped to 6.84%, with both purchases and refinances up by the same margin.

news.summary: Energy company ConocoPhillips (NYSE: COP) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on May 8, projecting quarterly earnings to reach $2.05 per share, an increase from $2.03 per share last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be $15.91 billion, up from $14.48 billion last year. Analysts at Bank of America Securities recently downgraded ConocoPhillips from Buy to Neutral, with a revised price target of $107, down from $138. At present, the company offers an annual dividend yield of 3.56%, with a quarterly dividend of 78 cents. This update and more details are available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: ConocoPhillips to report Q1 earnings on May 8, expected EPS $2.05 (up from $2.03) and revenue $15.91B (up from $14.48B). Bank of America downgraded rating to Neutral with $107 price target. Annual dividend yield is 3.56% with a quarterly dividend of 78.

news.summary: In San Francisco, BizCap®, a prominent national commercial finance and advisory firm, revealed their achievement in organizing and obtaining a substantial financial package for Cerebelly. Cerebelly is a top provider of organic, nutrient-dense baby and toddler food designed to enhance brain development. The financing secured will provide Cerebelly with the resources to enhance inventory and bolster working capital, thereby expediting the implementation of their extensive growth strategy. By tailoring their approach to meet the specific needs of Cerebelly, BizCap® has demonstrated their ability to provide custom solutions rather than relying on standardized methods.

news.summary: Kirker Enterprises, Inc., a top nail polish manufacturer, recently revealed their major investment in the Series A round of Blank Beauty Inc. located in Knoxville, TN. This strategic move includes contributions from Evolution VC Partners, a renowned venture capital fund from New York City, NY, and Epson Robots, a global leader in PC-controlled precision factory automation based in Los Alamitos, CA. news.summary: In Warsaw, Poland, Elavon, a top payment service provider globally, has introduced its latest payment gateway to the Polish market. The service named ''Elavon Payment Gateway'' allows businesses to receive payments in-store via POS terminals and online by utilizing an integrated payment gateway. Elavon aims to spearhead digital evolution and provide comprehensive solutions that incorporate a wide range of payment methods, including payment cards, BLIK, and Account-2-.

news.summary: In Hollywood, Florida, Santander US Auto has made strides in utilizing the FICO® Platform to bolster their credit risk analysis using machine learning capabilities. This strategic move has enabled them to develop an analytical framework for more efficient and reusable systems, ultimately trimming down development time. Their efforts have not gone unnoticed, as they recently received the esteemed 2025 FICO® Decisions Award in the AI, Machine Learning & Optimization category at the FICO World 25 event.

news.summary: In Atlanta, Logility, a part of Aptean and a top AI-driven supply chain management company, has been acknowledged as a technology frontrunner in the 2025 SPARK Matrix™ evaluation of the Supply Chain Network Design (SCND) sector by QKS group. Their Network Design Optimization software, fueled by advanced AI, stands out for aiding in tackling challenges brought about by fluctuating tariff regulations and other unforeseen disruptions. This recognition underscores Logility's expertise and innovation in the field as they continue to pave the way for efficient and adaptive supply chain solutions.

news.summary: Greystone Housing Impact Investors LP reported financial results for the first quarter of 2025. They announced net income of $0.11 per Beneficial Unit Certificate (BUC), basic and diluted Cash Available for Distribution (CAD) of $0.31 per BUC, total assets of $1.54 billion, and Mortgage Revenue Bond (MRB) and Governmental Issuer Loan (GIL) investments of $1.18 billion. The partnership saw unrealized losses on derivative positions of approximately $3.9 million and received cash from interest rate derivatives totaling about $847,000 in the first quarter. They declared a quarterly distribution of $0.37 per BUC, and provided updates on their investment and financing activities, joint venture equity investments, construction projects, upcoming income, and future earnings expectations. Greystone continues to assess new investments amidst market volatility and plans to host a conference call to discuss results further.
news.headline: Greystone Housing Impact Investors LP reported Q1 2025 financial results: Net income $0.11 per BUC, CAD $0.31 per BUC, total assets $1.54 billion, MRB and GIL investments $1.18 billion. Unrealized losses included in net income due to interest rate impacts. Received $847,000 from interest rate derivative positions. Distributed $0.37 per BUC to holders. Advanced funds on investments, sales, and issued $20M Series B Preferred Units. Joint venture sale resulted in $17.1M gross proceeds. Expected $1.8M income and $163K gain in Q2 2025. All investments current, executing hedging strategy. Six joint ventures completed construction, four under construction. Earnings call scheduled. (Characters: 385)
